##RRUFFID=R130754
##IDEAL CHEMISTRY=KNa_2_Fe^3+^_2_(Li_3_Si_12_)O_30_
##LOCALITY=N'Chwaning III mine, Kalahari manganese field, Northern Cape Province, South Africa
##OWNER=RRUFF
##SOURCE=Jaco and Tania Janse van Nieuwenhuizen
##DESCRIPTION=Fibrous spheres and layer of purple color, associated with dark-red lipuite (R140946).
##STATUS=The identification of this mineral has been confirmed only by single crystal X-ray diffraction

##FILETYPE=Raman Processed
